headline: an agent fixed the bug, then wrote the test for it
sub: ~60% fewer tokens per lookup. public beta.

headline: done is not merged. done is a receipt.
sub: agent, lookup, tokens: the trail that proves the work, not just claims it. public beta.

headline: preload everything, pay for nothing
sub: swapped to on-demand: ~60% fewer tokens per lookup.
cut the toolset in half and it got faster, and more right. choice overload is real.

headline: adoption isn't suggestions. it's shipped work.
sub: the unit: agent output that merges, passes review, and runs in prod. ~60% fewer tokens per lookup, measured.
